positive: A whimsical forest scene silhouette, featuring stylized glowing mushrooms, interwoven vines, and ethereal woodland creatures like deer and rabbits in dynamic poses. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, with dramatic negative space around the subjects. Use a deep indigo and vibrant emerald palette for the main contrast, against a matte off-white background. High contrast, vector art style, clean lines, suitable for textile printing, flat graphic design, engraved etching quality, rule of thirds composition, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, grain, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, messy, photorealistic, low contrast, ugly
